body:
## Review Summary

Good optimization — the versioned-hash index eliminates O(bundles × blobs) rehashing on every `getBlobsV2`/`V3` request. Two issues: a redundant `transaction_pool.remove(hash)` on line 61 (the entry was already removed on line 53), and `or_insert(HashMap::new())` on line 190 should be `or_default()` for idiomatic Rust. The cleanup path in `remove_blob_bundle` correctly handles shared blobs across transactions.

Note: `BlobsV1Request::handle` still uses the old `get_blobs_bundle_pool()` iteration with per-request rehashing — if V1 is still exercised in practice, it could benefit from the same optimization.

comments.body: Bug: `self.transaction_pool.remove(hash)` on line 53 already removed the entry and returned the value via the `let Some(tx) = ...` binding. This second `.remove(hash)` is a no-op. Should be deleted.
nit: `.or_insert(HashMap::new())` → `.or_default()` — avoids the closure and is idiomatic.
